title: 渚のリゾート Romanticに恋して

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, I just love coming to the beach! My heart
races with every trip!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha... I have to say, your driving makes my
heart race just as much.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Oh? But the real excitement is yet to come.
There's a place I've been dying to go to!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Wow, how beautiful! The interior is quite
classical. It's like a time capsule in here!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I knew you'd feel that way. This place just
screamed "hip" when I passed it by!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Check out these lights! This is an antique French
chandelier from the nineteenth century. And the
other ornaments are just as impressive...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
All right, we've got one day for this trip, so let's
enjoy it to the fullest!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Oh, and this gorgeous spa is to die for! I have to
get a good soak in. ♪

text_block_list.name: Hotel Concierge
text_block_list.text:
Pardon me, I would like to offer you two a drink
on the house.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Oh, how nice of you! Could I have a glass of
sparkling water with a slice of lemon? ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Tazuna, you order something too! Don't let the
jacuzzi turn you to jelly!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Phew, I had myself a wonderful time! I rarely eat
French cuisine, so I'd long forgotten how
delicious it can be!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Both the amuse-bouche and the dessert were
perfect! I love a good Italian dish, but French
feels right for this hotel!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Mister garçon, could you give my compliments to
the chef? The food was impeccable!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: I'm so impressed! This resort is the bee's knees!

text_block_list.name: Manager
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for your gracious comments. I am the
manager in charge of this hotel.

text_block_list.name: Manager
text_block_list.text:
If I could trouble you with a question... Was there
anything not to your liking thus far?

text_block_list.name: Manager
text_block_list.text:
...It doesn't have to be anything significant, but I
implore you to give me your honest opinion,
without any frills.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Oh my... but nothing exactly comes to mind. Is
this a simple feedback session, or is there more to
your question?

text_block_list.name: Manager
text_block_list.text:
I am most embarrassed to say this, but the truth
is...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: What? You're at risk of closing?

text_block_list.name: Manager
text_block_list.text:
Yes. We've been in the red for some time, with
the new resort in the area garnering most of the
attention. Time is not on our side, unfortunately...

text_block_list.name: Manager
text_block_list.text:
However, we're hoping to try something with this
renovation project we're planning...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
So, if I've got this right, you want our feedback to
help with ideas to improve the facility.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Is there any room for improvement? Hm... I do
want to help, but I have nothing but compliments
for this place.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Me too... But I can't turn a blind eye. This hotel is
your pride—losing it would be absolutely awful.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
...Oh! How does this sound? I could help out with
the renovation!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: For instance... I could be an ambassador of sorts!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Believe it or not, I have quite a lot of
connections! I'd be able to convince loads of
people of this place's charm. ♪

text_block_list.name: Manager
text_block_list.text:
W-would you really do that for us?! Thank you so
much!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, as I'm walking around the academy...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
"A seaside resort, I'm in the mood for romance."
Hm... it's not as trendy-sounding as I hoped.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Maruzen has become the ambassador for a hotel
resort! She's currently working on the lyrics for
their theme song...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
"A seaside resort, Love is in the air." Hmm...
Yeah, this is it! I've got my first line! Coming up
with the rest should be a piece of cake!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The catchy song becomes a hit on campus, and
the resort enjoys a boost in popularity.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Now to take it easy with a nice and relaxing
drive! ♪ Tazuna is busy with work, so... care to fill
her spot?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Now to take it easy with a nice and relaxing
drive! ♪ Tazuna is busy with work, so... care to fill
her spot?
